name: Walgreens
message: [AI generated] Walgreens is an American pharmaceutical retail company, established in 1901. It is one of the largest US drugstore chains, known for selling prescription and non-prescription drugs, health and wellness products, cosmetics, and groceries. It also offers health services like immunization and patient care clinics. Often, Walgreens operates 24/7 to allow customers access to their products and services at any hour.
